stemHtml: Which of the following is required for the term CAVOK to be used?

options.a: No cloud below 3000 ft, and no CU/CS.
options.b: No cloud below 5000 ft, and no CB/TCU.
options.c: No cloud covering half the sky below 3000 ft, and no CB/TCU.
options.d: No cloud covering half the sky below 5000 ft, and no CU/CS.
